line: Squee seen a fat beetle over by dat rock. Squee gonna get it before somebody else does.
Dat beetle got a shell on it like armor, but Squee don't care. Squee crack it open real good.
Ooh, shiny one! Shiny bugs always taste better, Squee thinks. Maybe it's da shell.
Big black beetle, fat belly, sittin' right dere — dat's a proper meal, dat is.
Squee had a blue beetle once dat tasted like pepper. Squee been lookin' for one like it ever since.
Dis one gots little horns on it. Squee ain't scared o' no horns. Squee gots teeth.
You ever had a dung beetle? You gotta wash it first. Squee learned dat da hard way.
A thousand beetles in one place — Squee call dat paradise. Other folks call it infested.
Dat red-spotted beetle got a bad taste to it. Squee spit it out, but only after chewin' it good first.
Squee always check under da logs first. Dat's where da best beetles hide from everyone but Squee.
Grubs is da best part o' da log. Squee dig 'em out wit his fingers, no problem.
White grub, fat grub, slow grub — easiest food dere is. Even Squee can't miss.
Dey squish a little when ya bite 'em but dat ain't a bad thing. Dat's da good part.
Squee found ten grubs in dis one log alone. Today is a good day.
Grubs is like little sausages dat made demselves. Nature is real smart like dat.
Roasted grubs gots a nutty smell. Squee don't know what nuts smell like, but he imagine it's like dis.
Squee wuz gonna share da grubs but den Squee remembered nobody else deserves 'em.
Big tree, big grubs. It always work like dat. Squee got it figured out.
A grub dat big oughta have a name before Squee eats it. Squee call it 'Dinner.'
Dose tree grubs is way better dan da ground grubs. Better diet, Squee thinks.
Squee likes flies okay, but dey never sit still long enough for a proper meal.
Caught a big horsefly. Nuthin' ta it once ya snatch 'em outta da air. Squee real fast.
Da wings on flies is crunchy like little crackers. Squee likes dat part most.
Squee don't understand why everybody always swavin' away da flies. Dat's free food just floatin' dere!
A whole swarm o' flies like dat? Squee could eat for a week.
Flies is too skinny. You need like a hundred of 'em to fill up, and Squee only caught eighty-seven today.
Dis one fly been buzzin' round Squee's ear for an hour. Now it's gonna buzz round Squee's belly instead.
Squee tried catchin' flies wit his tongue like a frog once. Only caught two dat way. Frog method ain't efficient.
Big black flies near da carcass is fat ones. Dat's where ya wanna look.
Da bottlefly is green and shiny and tastes real sour. Squee had worse.
A worm ain't a bug exactly, but it goes inna same hole at da end, so Squee count it.
Long skinny worm or short fat worm, Squee'll eat either one. Squee ain't picky.
Da purple worm in dat dungeon ain't really a worm, but Squee bet it taste like one if ya cook it long enough.
Worms after rain is da best time. Dey all come up to say hello to Squee.
Squee once ate a worm so long it took both hands to hold. Dat wuz a trophy meal.
Earthworms taste like dirt but in a good way. Like da earth is seasonin' it hisself.
Squee put four worms in his pocket for later. Dey already started escapin'. Sneaky worms.
Da red worm is spicier dan da brown one. Squee test a lot of worms to learn dat.
Chopped up worm on a stick over da fire is practically a kebab. Squee is basically a chef.
You laughin' at Squee's worm dinner? Squee had worse. Squee had way worse.
Maggots is already pre-cooked sorta. Dey warm from inside da meat, see.
Squee ain't ashamed o' eatin' maggots. Squee just ain't mentionin' it to nobody.
Dat meat ain't bad even wit da maggots. Maggots just mean it's ripe, Squee think.
You pick out da maggots or you eat 'em wit da rest — dat's a personal choice and Squee respect dat.
Maggots wriggle on da way down. Squee don't mind. It's like dey still alive wit you a little while.
Dese maggots is fat, which mean da meat wuz real good once. Squee just gettin' seconds of it now.
Squee fry da maggots til dey pop. Real satisfyin' sound. Real satisfyin' taste too.
Dose white maggots is milder. Da yellow ones gots more flavor. Squee do taste tests.
Folks always lookin' at Squee funny when he eat da maggots. Folks is missin' out is what Squee say.
A handful o' maggots is better dan nuthin'. And Squee's had a lotta nuthin' lately.
Slugs is slow. Squee is slow sometimes too. But Squee always catches da slug.
Da slime on a slug is part of it. You ain't supposed ta wipe it off. Dat's where da flavor is.
Big fat slug under dat wet log — Squee seen Christmas presents smaller dan dat.
Squee once ate a slug dat tasted like mushrooms. Squee still thinkin' bout it.
A slug on a rock in da sun gots a nice warm crust on it. Like da sun cooked it for ya.
Dis slug is bright orange. Squee dunno if dat mean it's good or bad. Squee gonna find out.
Slug stew ain't real fancy but it's real fillin'. Squee made it twice and he proud of dat.
Dey leave a trail so ya always know where dey been. Squee just follow da slime road.
Sea slugs is different. Saltier. Squee tried one. Still food.
Squee ate a slug and a snail back ta back. Snail's got better crunch but slug's got more o' it.
Dat bug gots wings. How Squee supposed ta catch a bug wit wings? Dis whole place is unfair.
Squee reach for it and it FLY away. All da good bugs fly away. Da bad ones crawl right up Squee's leg.
Squee spend half a hour chasin' dat dragonfly and it just laugh at him wit its big eyes.
Da moth go toward da light. Squee know dis. Squee USE dis. Squee's got a torch and a plan.
Dat big cricket jump six feet when Squee grab for it. Six feet! Like it think it's a frog!
Squee need a net or sumpthing. These wings is da problem. All da bugs here got wings.
Da stag beetle PINCH Squee. Squee appreciate da fight but not da bleedin'.
Squee sneak up real slow on dat grasshopper. Squee more patient dan he look.
Dis bug spray sumpthing at Squee's face. What kind o' bug sprays things?! Dat's cheatin'!
Squee dug a little pit for da beetles. Caught nine! Squee's a strategic thinker.
Da fire ant BITES back. Every single one. Squee still ate 'em tho. Respect.
Squee grab da hornet and squeeze before it knows what's happenin'. Speed is everything.
Spider spin a web all nice to catch bugs, but spider ain't check if Squee want dem bugs first.
Dat centipede got a hundred legs and every single one of 'em tryin' ta run away from Squee.
Squee wait by da light all night. Caught twelve moths. Not da best use o' time but Squee committed.
Da locust swarm is easy to catch if ya just open ya mouth and run. Squee's technique ain't elegant but it work.
Squee try ta grab da water strider and it just run on da water away. Bugs ain't supposed ta do dat.
Dis firefly blinkin' like it tryin' ta signal for help. Too late. Already in Squee's hand.
Squee use his shirt as a net. Caught five moths and now got moth dust all over Squee's face.
Dat scorpion sting Squee right on da palm. Squee eat it anyway. Worth it to prove a point.
Squee made stew again and nobody eat it. Squee gonna eat all of it hisself. Fine.
Squee don't got no spices. How Squee supposed ta cook wit no spices? Dis whole ship is under-stocked.
Dey say it taste bad. Squee's cookin' don't taste bad. Da ingredients taste bad. Dere's a difference.
Squee ask for a proper pot and dey give Squee a helmet. Squee cook in da helmet. It work but it ain't right.
Dis fire too hot. Last fire too cold. Squee can't work under dese conditions.
Nobody appreciate da bug soup until dey're hungry enough. Squee'll be waitin'.
Squee put a lot o' effort inna dat grub roast. Squee had a whole presentation planned out.
You want salt? Fine. Where Squee supposed ta get salt on a flying ship over a plane o' fire, huh?
Hanna said sumpthing rude 'bout Squee's cookin'. Squee don't wanna talk 'bout it.
Squee's worm stew got character. Just cause nobody else can taste da character don't mean it ain't dere.
Dey want Squee ta cook but dey don't wanna eat what Squee cooks. Dat's a contradiction.
Squee try to make it fancy dis time. Squee arranged da grubs in a circle. Artistic. Still nobody ate 'em.
Da stove on dis ship is broken again. Squee gonna cook on da engine exhaust. Squee resourceful like dat.
Squee found herbs. Squee don't know what kind. Squee put 'em in da pot anyway. It's called experimentation.
Gerrard complain 'bout Squee's cookin' and den eat half of it. Make up ya mind, Squee say.
Squee's beetle broth is an acquired taste. Most folks just ain't acquired it yet.
Nobody wanna taste Squee's new recipe. Fine. Squee's new recipe was mostly fer Squee anyway.
Squee out of salt, out o' herbs, out of proper firewood. What Squee's supposed ta cook wit, enthusiasm?
Squee burnt da bug stew. But da burnt part is just more flavor, is what Squee figures.
Da crew always want Squee ta cook den don't eat it. Maybe Squee go on strike. Squee think 'bout dat.
Dis thing ain't a bug exactly but Squee gonna taste it and find out for sure.
Round, brown, and squishy — Squee give it a lick. Nuthin' terrible yet.
How ya gonna know what it is without tastin' it? Dat's da only way Squee knows anything.
It look like a bug but it ain't movin'. Still worth a try. Don't waste food, Squee say.
Squee bite inta it and it taste like metal and sadness. Squee put it down.
First bite — no. Second bite — maybe. Third bite — Squee finish da whole thing.
Squee don't know what it is but it ain't poison yet. Squee know what poison taste like.
Could be a root. Could be a grub egg. Squee treat it like a grub egg just in case.
Tastes like mushroom. But wrong. Like mushroom's sneaky cousin. Squee still eat it.
Squee lick da crystal. Taste like salt and magic. Both good, Squee say.
It smell real bad. But lots o' Squee's favorite things smell real bad. Squee take another bite.
Dat fruit squirt sumpthing on Squee's face when he bite it. At least now Squee know it was ripe.
Bitter first, den sweet at da end. Like it changin' its mind. Squee respect dat.
Squee chew it for a long time hopin' it get better. It don't. But Squee finish it anyway cause waste is bad.
Nobody else wanted ta try it, so Squee tried it fer everybody. Squee's a hero is what dat is.
It don't got a taste at all. No flavor whatsoever. Dat's almost worse dan bad flavor.
Squee ate sumpthing glowin' once. It tasted fine. Squee glowed a little too, but dat fade eventually.
Weird texture but interesting. Like chewin' on a sponge dat been somewhere interestin'.
Dis one's real spicy. Squee's ears is smokin'. Squee wants more.
Squee identify every food by tastin' it. Squee basically a food expert at dis point.
Squee can't fight on an empty stomach. Well, Squee can, but Squee's mad about it da whole time.
Dere's a dragon over dere and a sandwich in Squee's hand and Squee know which one Squee carin' about right now.
Squee's belly is makin' noises dat sound like it's angry at Squee. It's real personal.
How long since Squee ate? Two days? Tree days? Squee's losin' count and dat's bad.
Squee don't understand goin' on a quest wit no food. Dat's just a long way ta starve.
Gerrard say focus on da mission. Squee's stomach say focus on da food. Squee's stomach is louder.
Squee fight better when Squee had sumpthing ta eat. Dat should be obvious ta everybody.
Next time Squee plan a quest, Squee plan da food part first. Den da hero part. In dat order.
Dis dungeon ain't got a single bug in it. Not one. Who cleaned dis place?
Squee sniff da air. Nuthin'. No food smell. No bug smell. Just danger smell. Squee don't like dis place.
If dey wanted Squee ta be a hero, dey shoulda packed a lunch. Dat's just logical.
Squee ate da last ration four hours ago and now everything look like a big soft grub.
Squee can track a beetle a mile away when Squee's hungry. Hunger make Squee's nose extra good.
We been walkin' for seven hours and nobody thought ta bring snacks. Squee is surrounded by amateurs.
Squee ain't sayin' nuthin' 'bout dat last battle til Squee gets sumpthing ta eat.
Da worst part o' bein' dead wuz missin' dinner. Da second worst part wuz comin' back before dessert.
Squee focus real good when Squee ain't hungry. But Squee is always hungry so Squee's never focused.
Squee's gonna need at least three meals before he explain what happened back dere.
Da battlefield smell like smoke and blood and Squee just wishin' it smelled like grubs instead.
Squee know dere's food somewhere on dis ship. Squee gonna find it even if he gotta check every cabinet on board.
Dat golem look just like a big dung beetle. Same shape, same smell, same slow walk.
Dis whole island look like it been chewed on by sumpthing real big. Squee respect dat.
Dat cloud over dere look like a grub. Big fat gray grub. Squee hungry now.
Da dungeon door make a crackin' sound like a beetle shell when ya step on it. Nostalgic, dat sound.
Dis rock got veins in it like a big fat worm. Squee tap it wit his finger just to check.
Dat spell look like fireflies and Squee reach for one before he remember dey ain't real.
Da ship's anchor always remind Squee of a giant stag beetle. Same shape, but less bitey.
Dis mushroom smell like a slug dat sat in da sun too long. Squee take dat as a good sign.
Gerrard's hair after a fight look like a bird nest full o' beetles. Squee keeps lookin' at it.
Da Phyrexian machine gots legs like a centipede. Squee wonder if it taste like one too.
Dat vine hangin' down look exactly like a big earthworm. Squee almost bit it.
Dis plane o' fire smell like overcooked fly. Da bad kind o' overcooked, where ya burn da wings.
Da Weatherlight's pipes make a noise like a swarm o' hornets. Squee check for hornets. No hornets. Disappointin'.
Squee look at da stars and one bunch of 'em make da shape of a big grub. Squee calls it da Grub Constellation.
Dis spell component look like a dried-up maggot and Squee gonna taste it before anybody says otherwise.
Da enemy's armor gots a sheen like a big beetle. Squee is distracted but he fight anyway.
Dis gem look like a big fat beetle eye. Real pretty. Squee wonder if it crunch da same.
All dese artifacts and dey all look like big metal bugs to Squee. Which one is da tastiest, Squee wonder.
Da fog on dis plane is thick and chewy-feelin'. Like breathin' inna slug. Squee don't hate it.
Dat warrior got a voice like a giant hornet and Squee just wanna smash it and eat it on instinct.
Afterlife is real. It got bugs. Lots of bugs. Squee been dere. Would recommend.
Squee die and come back so many times he started memorizing da menu at da afterlife feast.
Up dere past da clouds, all da bugs ya ever missed is waitin' for ya. Dat's what Squee believe.
Da afterlife smell like roasted beetles and Squee is only a little sad he had ta leave.
Squee died once and dere wuz a table longer dan dis ship covered in grubs and Squee wuz halfway down da table when he got pulled back.
Bein' immortal is nice but every time Squee almost get ta da bug feast he come back here instead.
In da afterlife ya can eat da same bug a thousand times and it always taste like da first time. Squee know dis.
Da other goblins don't come back from da afterlife. Dey stayin' for da free buffet, Squee bet.
Squee ain't afraid o' dyin'. Squee afraid o' missin' dinner. Dyin' just mean more bugs right away.
Da afterlife gots a real nice smell. Warm bugs and fresh soil and sumpthing Squee can't name but want to eat.
Every time Squee come back, he leave a little bit more o' hisself dere. Mostly da part that's full from da bug feast.
Squee look forward to da final time, not 'cause he's ready, but 'cause he can finally finish da full bug feast meal.
Dere's flies in da afterlife too, but dey slow. Everybody's slow in da afterlife. Real easy ta catch.
Squee saw a worm in da afterlife dat never ended. Just a infinite worm. Squee started eatin' from da middle.
Da afterlife bug feast got slugs dat's big as Squee's arm. Squee had four o' dem before da resurrection pulled him back.
Squee come back from da dead and da first thing he said wuz 'Squee wuz right in da middle o' sumpthing!'
In da afterlife, nobody fight ya for da good grubs. Dey just yours. All o' dem.
Squee only regret is dat he can't bring da afterlife grubs back wit him when he return.
Da afterlife bug fest is dark and warm and full o' da right smells. Squee call dat heaven.
Squee seen da afterlife and it got one long table and one real big pile o' beetles and dat's all Squee need to know it's good.
Best bug Squee ever had: da big purple grub on Dominaria. Tastes like sugarcane and feet. Incredible.
Worst bug Squee ever had: da glowing centipede. It taste like regret and da burning never fully stop.
Squee give dese beetles a six outta ten. Not bad but not special. Average beetle.
Dis grub is a definite ten. Squee finish it and immediately start lookin' for another log.
Squee rank all da bugs he eat. Grubs is first. Always grubs first.
Dat moth taste like dusty bread. Squee give it a three. Squee's had worse but not on purpose.
Fireflies is a seven. Pretty good, little sparkle on da tongue. Very festive.
Maggots is a solid eight when dey fresh. Lower when dey old. Squee gots standards.
Squee ate a worm from every plane. Ravnica worms is best. Weird texture but big flavor.
Da hornets is too spicy for a seven but too tasty for a six. Squee give it a six-and-a-half.
Scarab beetle: two outta ten. All shell, no bug inside. It's like a hollow disappoint ment.
Squee made a list once o' every bug worth eatin'. Da list is long. Da ones not worth it is shorter.
Big slug from Mirrodin got a metallic aftertaste dat Squee didn't like. Five outta ten. Don't recommend.
Da flies in summer is fatter dan da ones in fall. Summer flies is a solid seven. Fall flies is a four.
Squee eat a bug from every plane and da ranking go: Dominaria, Ravnica, Mirrodin, everywhere else, Phyrexia (never again).
Ants is a five. You gotta eat like ten thousand to feel it and dey's annoyed da whole time.
Termites is sneaky good. Squee give 'em an eight. Dey melt on ya tongue almost.
Squee tried a glowbug from Shadowmoor. Gave it a nine. Tasted like sweet swamp and it lit up Squee's belly for a hour.
Da Phyrexian bug-things taste like oil and bad choices. Squee give it a one. Don't try it. Don't.
Squee's personal best meal: seventeen grubs, two beetles, and a worm stew. Squee still think 'bout dat day.
Squee don't go around eatin' da crew's things. Squee just taste 'em a little first.
Dat's a spell component? Look like a grub egg ta Squee. Just gonna check real quick.
Squee ate da artifact. Squee ain't apologizin'. It looked like a big brown grub and it wuz RIGHT THERE.
Dis is a magical component? Taste like a regular old worm ta Squee. Maybe a little more chewy.
Dat's Mirri's pet? It look like a big bug, Squee thought it wuz free food. Honest mistake.
Squee nibble da corner o' da phylactery. It taste like a termite mound. Squee try another corner.
Nobody said Squee couldn't eat da magic mushrooms. Nobody said specifically. In dem exact words.
Squee taste da potion bottle. Da bottle, not da potion — but also da potion, little bit. By accident.
Dat's a rare component worth ten thousand gold? Well now it's worth nuthin' cause Squee ate it already.
Squee didn't MEAN ta eat da pet lizard. It wuz movin' slow and Squee wuz hungry and everything went real fast.
Da crystal look like it could be food. Most things could be food if you try hard enough.
Squee lick da magic stone once. It zap Squee real good. Worth it for da tingly taste.
Squee find da scroll and unroll it ta see if it's edible. It ain't but it weren't poisonous neither so dat's fine.
Ertai's mana gem look like a real big blue beetle eye and Squee think 'bout eatin' it real hard every single day.
Squee taste da ancient artifact from before Antiquities. It taste like history and regret and a little bit like clay.
Nobody told Squee dat da summoning token wasn't edible. Squee wuz just bein' thorough.
If it's squishy and smaller dan Squee's fist, Squee's gonna try eatin' it. Dat's a policy.
Squee eat da captain's rations. Squee ain't proud of it. But Squee ain't sorry neither.
Dat fungus on da magic sword — Squee ate dat too. Nobody wuz usin' it and it wuz real nice fungus.
Squee wuz gonna not eat da navigator's lucky charm but da lucky charm smelled like caramel and Squee is only so strong.
If you ain't gonna eat da bugs, dey gonna eat you. Squee learned dat early on.
A full belly make a smart goblin. An empty belly make a desperate one. Squee been both.
Squee's rule: never eat nuthin' dat glow unless it smell good first.
Da biggest bug ain't always da best bug. But it's always worth trying, is Squee's opinion.
Food don't wait for ya. Squee learned dis from every meal he ever missed.
You can judge a place by its bugs. Good bugs mean good soil. Good soil mean good food nearby.
Squee always eat before a big fight. You can't concentrate on bein' brave when ya belly is rumblin'.
Best way ta tell if sumpthing is food: put it in ya mouth. Simple as dat.
Squee say: waste no worm, want no worm. If ya find it, ya eat it.
If da bug run from ya, it taste better. Slow bugs ain't worried 'bout bein' caught. Fast bugs is smart and smart bugs is delicious.
Squee's opinion is dat any bug ya can catch twice is a tame bug and tame bugs is da best kind.
Never trust a plane without bugs. A place wit no bugs ain't a real place. It's a trap.
You find a grub, you eat da grub. Don't think 'bout it. Don't name it. Just eat it.
Da crew say Squee's stomach is iron. Squee say his stomach is practical.
If it look like food, smell like food, or could maybe possibly be food, den it is food for Squee's purposes.
Squee always carry extra grubs. Not for trading. Not for showing off. For emergencies.
Da uglier da bug, da better it taste. Squee don't make da rules. Squee just observe da facts.
Squee eat everything and throw up nuthin'. Dat is a superpower nobody on dis ship appreciate.
Bugs is protein. Protein is energy. Energy is how ya survive. Dis is science, dis is.
Squee seen enough to know: you always find food if ya look hard enough in da right places, which is everywhere.
Dis whole rotten log is full o' fat grubs and Squee ain't tellin' nobody. Dis is Squee's log.
Squee count fourteen beetles under dat rock. Squee real excited. Squee try not to show it.
Squee tried eatin' a firefly once and his burps glowed for a whole afternoon. Worth it.
Squee find a whole wasp nest and now Squee's runnin'. But Squee's still thinkin' 'bout da meal.
Dese are termites. Squee likes termites. Termites is very helpful — to Squee's belly.
Squee see a big cockroach and he think: friend or food? Den Squee remember Squee ain't got friends on dis plane.
Da locust taste like a crunchy leaf dat's real mad 'bout it. Eight outta ten.
Squee find a caterpillar. Fat one. Da fuzzy kind. Squee wonder if da fuzz cook off or if ya gotta scrape it.
Praying mantis look too much like it's thinkin' about Squee. Squee eat it first before it get any ideas.
Squee hear a cricketsong and start walkin' toward it like a compass pointin' north.
Pill bug roll up in a ball. Squee pop it like a grape. Satisfying in every way.
Squee ate a tarantula once. Very chewy. Very filling. Squee would do it again.
Da water bug is good. Little fishy taste but mostly bug. Squee gives it a solid seven.
Squee catch a dragonfly and hold it up. Pretty wings. Real crunchy wings. Real delicious wings.
Squee want ta know which bug taste best on Mirrodin. All metal bugs taste like bits o' tin so far.
Squee made a grub casserole. It smell like old boots in da best way. Nobody came near it. Squee eat it all.
Squee got stung seventeen times today. Still got da honeycomb tho. Worth every sting.
Squee roast a centipede on a stick. Every single leg is da crunchiest part. One hundred crunchy bites.
Snail is just a slug in a house. Da house is annoying but Squee eat through it just fine.
Squee never met a moth he didn't like eventually. After da third bite or so.
Squee always flip over fallen trees first. It's like openin' a present, is what it is.
Wood lice is a little spicy. Not intentionally spicy, just accidentally spicy. Squee like 'em.
Squee's definition o' a good day: find bugs, eat bugs, find more bugs.
Squee knows every eatin' bug and every not-eatin' bug. Da not-eatin' list is very short.
Squee always keep a live beetle in his pocket for emergencies. It always escape by lunchtime though.
Squee can smell a grub from twenty feet away. Forty feet if da wind's right.
Squee and da slug have a standoff for a moment. Den Squee win da standoff by eating da slug.
Dere wuz a bug in Squee's hammock and Squee count dat as a bedtime snack.
Squee always eat da antenna last. It's like a little after-dinner crunch.
Squee's stomach growl so loud it wake up somebody on da next bunk. Den Squee's stomach growl at dat somebody.
Squee don't get sick from bad food because Squee's body decided a long time ago: all food is acceptable food.
Squee ate a rock once ta see. It wuz a rock. Nuthin' more. But Squee wuz thorough.
Squee put da snail in his pocket, walk for five minutes, take it out — still dere. Best pet. Also eventual snack.
When Squee's hungry he start lookin' at everyone's shoes for slugs. It's a habit.
Squee think da best thing 'bout bein' on a sky ship is dat it get close ta da cloud insects.
Squee is patient about most things but not food. Squee is NOT patient about food.
Squee put the grub in his mouth to taste it and everybody start yellin'. It was already in dere! Too late!
Squee's idea o' a perfect day involve three meals, ten snacks, and no anybody tellin' him what he shouldn't eat.
Squee follow da smell of food like it got him on a string. He don't fight it.
Squee don't understand food dat don't fight back a little. It's just honest, is what a feisty bug is.
Squee once found a cave fulla bats and spent three happy hours catching 'em. Bats taste like flying mouse bugs.
Squee ain't picky. Squee is adventurous. Dere's a difference dat Squee's stomach fully understand.
Dat big blue grub on Mirrodin is better dan anything on Dominaria and Squee ain't sayin' dat lightly.
Squee find mold on da bread and eat da mold first. Squee like mold. It taste like advanced bread.
Squee wuz not supposed ta eat da sea monster's egg. It wuz enormous and Squee wuz very hungry. Dat's all Squee sayin'.
Dey say da food here is dangerous. Squee ask: dangerous ta eat or dangerous ta find? Big difference.
Squee's ideal meal: big steaming bowl of grubs wit some roasted beetles on da side and a fat slug for dessert.
Squee's least favorite thing: hearin' somebody else eat when Squee got nuthin'.
Squee tried dyin' just to get ta da bug feast again. Da others didn't appreciate dis plan.
Squee once go two weeks wit no food on a forsaken plane and come out angrier than when he went in. And hungry.
Dat new plane they landed on — first thing Squee done wuz flip a rock. Bug assessment.
Squee judge da quality of a new world by how good da bugs are. Dis world gets a six so far.
Squee's personal philosophy: when in doubt, eat it. You'll find out soon enough either way.
A goblin without food is a goblin wit a bad attitude. Squee is very good at provin' dat.
Squee's got a hollow leg where da extra bugs go. Or at least dat's what Squee's tellin' everybody.
Squee want ta know who decided berries is better dan bugs. Squee want ta argue wit dat person specifically.
Squee smell sumpthing good and start walkin'. Squee don't ask questions. Squee just walk toward da good smell.
Onna good day Squee eat forty bugs. On a slow day maybe fifteen. Today wuz a slow day and Squee is disappointed.
Dis rock got little critters underneath it and Squee is real happy about dat.
Squee always eat da legs off da beetle first. Den work inward. Got a system.
Squee is on dish duty and Squee use dat opportunity to taste everything in every pot. It's called quality control.
Squee ask Hanna if dere is bugs on Mercadia and she say yes and Squee is da only one excited by dis news.
Squee tried everything else on dis menu. Dat leave da mystery item which Squee believe is a bug in disguise.
Squee ain't never met a grub he didn't respect, even if dat respect mean eating it right away.
Dere's a little bug on da table leg and it wuz MINDING ITS BUSINESS but Squee can't leave bugs alone.
